rolePermissions.title: Roles & permissions
rolePermissions.subtitle: Choose which Discord roles may manage individual Rankoon modules.
rolePermissions.ownerHint: Only the Discord server owner may view and change role permissions.
rolePermissions.ownerDescription: The server owner always retains access to every module and role management. This permission cannot be restricted.
rolePermissions.emptyHint: Change the search term to display more roles.

xp.name: XP & Levels
xp.description: Manage XP sources, levels and rewards

reporting.name: Reports
reporting.description: View activity, command and error reports

errors.ownerOnly: Only the server owner can manage role permissions.
errors.permissionDenied: Access denied. Reload the page or check the server owner.
errors.permissionConflict: Permissions changed in the meantime. Reload and review your changes.

permissions.nullRole: Roles must not contain empty entries.
permissions.roleNotInGuild: The role does not belong to this server.
permissions.modulesRequired: Module IDs are required for the role.
permissions.duplicateModule: Duplicate modules are not allowed for a role.
permissions.revisionConflict: Role permissions changed since they were loaded. Reload and try again.

apiErrors.conflict: The data changed. Reload and try again.
